item.itunes:title: 臺灣不重視文化保存！？現在開始做文化保存會太晚嗎？Taiwan does not prioritize cultural preservation|#我的學習筆記 #564 @mynotebooks
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
從「皇民化」到「哈日」：為什麼台灣人不恨日本？

影片開頭，牛哥首先祝賀台灣光復節快樂，並藉此機會探討台灣和日本之間複雜的歷史和情感糾葛。他提到，儘管日本曾經殖民台灣，但現今的台灣社會卻普遍存在著「哈日」現象，這與中國大陸強調日本侵略歷史、教育人民仇恨日本的狀況形成鮮明對比。為了深入探討這個議題，牛哥回顧了歷史，分析了台灣和韓國在日本殖民統治下不同的遭遇和反應。他指出，台灣在清朝時期被割讓給日本後，雖然出現了多次武裝抗日運動，但由於日本是根據條約取得台灣，且台灣本身就是一個移民社會，歷經多次政權更迭，因此許多台灣人民選擇默默接受日本的統治，或以其他方式抵抗殖民體制。

不同的歷史遭遇：台灣和韓國的抗日經驗

相較之下，韓國在歷史上一直維持著獨立自主的地位，直到日本帝國主義崛起後才淪為日本的侵略目標。韓國人民長期以來都強烈抵制日本的入侵，特別是在1910年，親日派官員李完用簽署了《日韓合併條約》，將韓國的主權拱手讓給日本，更激起了韓國人民的憤慨和反抗意識。牛哥進一步指出，由於地理位置的差異，台灣在遭受日本殖民統治時，部分不願接受日本統治的社會精英選擇逃往中國大陸，這也間接削弱了台灣人民的抵抗力量。而韓國由於地理位置的限制，人民無處可逃，只能團結一致抵抗外侮，因此在面對日本殖民統治時，展現出比台灣更為強烈的反抗意識。

文化傳承與認同：日治時期的台灣文化發展

儘管在日本殖民統治下，台灣的本土文化受到壓制，但越是被壓抑，反而發展得越發蓬勃。日治時期的台灣文學、語言、戲劇等藝術形式都展現出獨特的風格，例如：賴和的《一桿「稱仔」》、楊逵的《送報伕》、吳濁流的《亞細亞的孤兒》等文學作品，以及鄧雨賢的《四季紅》、《雨夜花》、《望春風》、《月夜愁》等膾炙人口的歌曲，都深受當時社會環境的影響。即使在皇民化運動時期，傳統戲劇表演受到限制，但台灣的戲劇從業人員仍找到了應對之道，並將這些經驗傳承下來，影響了後來享譽國際的布袋戲表演形式。

戰後「反日教育」的矛盾與轉變

二戰後，國民政府為了鞏固統治 legitimacy，在台灣推行「反日教育」，強調日本的侵略和剝削，並將台灣的抗日運動與中國的抗日戰爭連結起來，試圖激發台灣人民的「反日」情緒，並將台灣納入中國的版圖。然而，為了在國共內戰中取得優勢，蔣介石選擇與部分日本軍官合作，例如：接受岡村寧次的建議，並成立由前日本軍官組成的「白團」軍事顧問團，協助國民政府進行軍事訓練和作戰指導。這種一邊「反日」一邊與日本合作的矛盾行徑，也反映出當時政治環境的複雜性。

從「反日」到「哈日」：台灣社會的轉變

隨著台灣的民主化和本土化，以及李登輝等政治人物的影響，台灣社會逐漸擺脫過去的「反日」情結，轉而 embrace 與日本的友好關係。李登輝曾公開表示，自己在22歲以前是日本人，日語是他的母語，他的價值觀也深受日本文化的影響。他主張釣魚台主權屬於日本，並提出「日本精神」、「台日命運共同體」等主張，引發了統派人士的不滿和批評。而國民黨作為統派陣營的主力，一方面要面對統派人士的壓力，另一方面也要顧及台灣社會的主流民意，因此在對日議題上表現得搖擺不定，時而批評日本，時而又對日本示好，導致黨內出現矛盾的聲音。

台日關係的升溫：從敵對到友好

雖然中華民國與日本在1972年斷交，但在經貿、文化等領域的交流卻從未間斷。近年來，隨著中國的崛起，以及台海局勢的緊張，台日關係更加緊密。2011年的311東日本大地震，台灣人民慷慨解囊，捐款金額高達253億日圓，讓日本民眾深受感動，也讓「台日友好」的呼聲在日本廣泛流傳。此外，日本在政治、經濟、文化等方面也積極拉攏台灣，例如：支持台灣參與國際組織、提供台灣優惠的貿易條件、推廣日本文化等，這些舉措都讓台灣人民對日本的好感度不斷提升。

結語：台日關係的未來展望

影片最後，牛哥總結指出，台日關係的發展歷經了複雜的歷史演變，從殖民時期的對立，到戰後的「反日」教育，再到現今的友好關係，反映了國際局勢的變遷，以及台灣社會的轉型。面對中國的威脅，台日兩國 semakin memperkuat kerja sama di berbagai bidang, 共同維護區域和平與穩定。而台灣人民對日本的「哈日」現象，也反映出台灣社會對民主、自由、法治等普世價值的認同，以及對日本文化和社會發展模式的欣賞。

item.description:
從「皇民化」到「哈日」：為什麼台灣人不恨日本？

影片開頭，牛哥首先祝賀台灣光復節快樂，並藉此機會探討台灣和日本之間複雜的歷史和情感糾葛。他提到，儘管日本曾經殖民台灣，但現今的台灣社會卻普遍存在著「哈日」現象，這與中國大陸強調日本侵略歷史、教育人民仇恨日本的狀況形成鮮明對比。為了深入探討這個議題，牛哥回顧了歷史，分析了台灣和韓國在日本殖民統治下不同的遭遇和反應。他指出，台灣在清朝時期被割讓給日本後，雖然出現了多次武裝抗日運動，但由於日本是根據條約取得台灣，且台灣本身就是一個移民社會，歷經多次政權更迭，因此許多台灣人民選擇默默接受日本的統治，或以其他方式抵抗殖民體制。

不同的歷史遭遇：台灣和韓國的抗日經驗

相較之下，韓國在歷史上一直維持著獨立自主的地位，直到日本帝國主義崛起後才淪為日本的侵略目標。韓國人民長期以來都強烈抵制日本的入侵，特別是在1910年，親日派官員李完用簽署了《日韓合併條約》，將韓國的主權拱手讓給日本，更激起了韓國人民的憤慨和反抗意識。牛哥進一步指出，由於地理位置的差異，台灣在遭受日本殖民統治時，部分不願接受日本統治的社會精英選擇逃往中國大陸，這也間接削弱了台灣人民的抵抗力量。而韓國由於地理位置的限制，人民無處可逃，只能團結一致抵抗外侮，因此在面對日本殖民統治時，展現出比台灣更為強烈的反抗意識。

文化傳承與認同：日治時期的台灣文化發展

儘管在日本殖民統治下，台灣的本土文化受到壓制，但越是被壓抑，反而發展得越發蓬勃。日治時期的台灣文學、語言、戲劇等藝術形式都展現出獨特的風格，例如：賴和的《一桿「稱仔」》、楊逵的《送報伕》、吳濁流的《亞細亞的孤兒》等文學作品，以及鄧雨賢的《四季紅》、《雨夜花》、《望春風》、《月夜愁》等膾炙人口的歌曲，都深受當時社會環境的影響。即使在皇民化運動時期，傳統戲劇表演受到限制，但台灣的戲劇從業人員仍找到了應對之道，並將這些經驗傳承下來，影響了後來享譽國際的布袋戲表演形式。

戰後「反日教育」的矛盾與轉變

二戰後，國民政府為了鞏固統治 legitimacy，在台灣推行「反日教育」，強調日本的侵略和剝削，並將台灣的抗日運動與中國的抗日戰爭連結起來，試圖激發台灣人民的「反日」情緒，並將台灣納入中國的版圖。然而，為了在國共內戰中取得優勢，蔣介石選擇與部分日本軍官合作，例如：接受岡村寧次的建議，並成立由前日本軍官組成的「白團」軍事顧問團，協助國民政府進行軍事訓練和作戰指導。這種一邊「反日」一邊與日本合作的矛盾行徑，也反映出當時政治環境的複雜性。

從「反日」到「哈日」：台灣社會的轉變

隨著台灣的民主化和本土化，以及李登輝等政治人物的影響，台灣社會逐漸擺脫過去的「反日」情結，轉而 embrace 與日本的友好關係。李登輝曾公開表示，自己在22歲以前是日本人，日語是他的母語，他的價值觀也深受日本文化的影響。他主張釣魚台主權屬於日本，並提出「日本精神」、「台日命運共同體」等主張，引發了統派人士的不滿和批評。而國民黨作為統派陣營的主力，一方面要面對統派人士的壓力，另一方面也要顧及台灣社會的主流民意，因此在對日議題上表現得搖擺不定，時而批評日本，時而又對日本示好，導致黨內出現矛盾的聲音。

台日關係的升溫：從敵對到友好

雖然中華民國與日本在1972年斷交，但在經貿、文化等領域的交流卻從未間斷。近年來，隨著中國的崛起，以及台海局勢的緊張，台日關係更加緊密。2011年的311東日本大地震，台灣人民慷慨解囊，捐款金額高達253億日圓，讓日本民眾深受感動，也讓「台日友好」的呼聲在日本廣泛流傳。此外，日本在政治、經濟、文化等方面也積極拉攏台灣，例如：支持台灣參與國際組織、提供台灣優惠的貿易條件、推廣日本文化等，這些舉措都讓台灣人民對日本的好感度不斷提升。

結語：台日關係的未來展望

影片最後，牛哥總結指出，台日關係的發展歷經了複雜的歷史演變，從殖民時期的對立，到戰後的「反日」教育，再到現今的友好關係，反映了國際局勢的變遷，以及台灣社會的轉型。面對中國的威脅，台日兩國 semakin memperkuat kerja sama di berbagai bidang, 共同維護區域和平與穩定。而台灣人民對日本的「哈日」現象，也反映出台灣社會對民主、自由、法治等普世價值的認同，以及對日本文化和社會發展模式的欣賞。

item.content:encoded:
從「皇民化」到「哈日」：為什麼台灣人不恨日本？

影片開頭，牛哥首先祝賀台灣光復節快樂，並藉此機會探討台灣和日本之間複雜的歷史和情感糾葛。他提到，儘管日本曾經殖民台灣，但現今的台灣社會卻普遍存在著「哈日」現象，這與中國大陸強調日本侵略歷史、教育人民仇恨日本的狀況形成鮮明對比。為了深入探討這個議題，牛哥回顧了歷史，分析了台灣和韓國在日本殖民統治下不同的遭遇和反應。他指出，台灣在清朝時期被割讓給日本後，雖然出現了多次武裝抗日運動，但由於日本是根據條約取得台灣，且台灣本身就是一個移民社會，歷經多次政權更迭，因此許多台灣人民選擇默默接受日本的統治，或以其他方式抵抗殖民體制。

不同的歷史遭遇：台灣和韓國的抗日經驗

相較之下，韓國在歷史上一直維持著獨立自主的地位，直到日本帝國主義崛起後才淪為日本的侵略目標。韓國人民長期以來都強烈抵制日本的入侵，特別是在1910年，親日派官員李完用簽署了《日韓合併條約》，將韓國的主權拱手讓給日本，更激起了韓國人民的憤慨和反抗意識。牛哥進一步指出，由於地理位置的差異，台灣在遭受日本殖民統治時，部分不願接受日本統治的社會精英選擇逃往中國大陸，這也間接削弱了台灣人民的抵抗力量。而韓國由於地理位置的限制，人民無處可逃，只能團結一致抵抗外侮，因此在面對日本殖民統治時，展現出比台灣更為強烈的反抗意識。

文化傳承與認同：日治時期的台灣文化發展

儘管在日本殖民統治下，台灣的本土文化受到壓制，但越是被壓抑，反而發展得越發蓬勃。日治時期的台灣文學、語言、戲劇等藝術形式都展現出獨特的風格，例如：賴和的《一桿「稱仔」》、楊逵的《送報伕》、吳濁流的《亞細亞的孤兒》等文學作品，以及鄧雨賢的《四季紅》、《雨夜花》、《望春風》、《月夜愁》等膾炙人口的歌曲，都深受當時社會環境的影響。即使在皇民化運動時期，傳統戲劇表演受到限制，但台灣的戲劇從業人員仍找到了應對之道，並將這些經驗傳承下來，影響了後來享譽國際的布袋戲表演形式。

戰後「反日教育」的矛盾與轉變

二戰後，國民政府為了鞏固統治 legitimacy，在台灣推行「反日教育」，強調日本的侵略和剝削，並將台灣的抗日運動與中國的抗日戰爭連結起來，試圖激發台灣人民的「反日」情緒，並將台灣納入中國的版圖。然而，為了在國共內戰中取得優勢，蔣介石選擇與部分日本軍官合作，例如：接受岡村寧次的建議，並成立由前日本軍官組成的「白團」軍事顧問團，協助國民政府進行軍事訓練和作戰指導。這種一邊「反日」一邊與日本合作的矛盾行徑，也反映出當時政治環境的複雜性。

從「反日」到「哈日」：台灣社會的轉變

隨著台灣的民主化和本土化，以及李登輝等政治人物的影響，台灣社會逐漸擺脫過去的「反日」情結，轉而 embrace 與日本的友好關係。李登輝曾公開表示，自己在22歲以前是日本人，日語是他的母語，他的價值觀也深受日本文化的影響。他主張釣魚台主權屬於日本，並提出「日本精神」、「台日命運共同體」等主張，引發了統派人士的不滿和批評。而國民黨作為統派陣營的主力，一方面要面對統派人士的壓力，另一方面也要顧及台灣社會的主流民意，因此在對日議題上表現得搖擺不定，時而批評日本，時而又對日本示好，導致黨內出現矛盾的聲音。

台日關係的升溫：從敵對到友好

雖然中華民國與日本在1972年斷交，但在經貿、文化等領域的交流卻從未間斷。近年來，隨著中國的崛起，以及台海局勢的緊張，台日關係更加緊密。2011年的311東日本大地震，台灣人民慷慨解囊，捐款金額高達253億日圓，讓日本民眾深受感動，也讓「台日友好」的呼聲在日本廣泛流傳。此外，日本在政治、經濟、文化等方面也積極拉攏台灣，例如：支持台灣參與國際組織、提供台灣優惠的貿易條件、推廣日本文化等，這些舉措都讓台灣人民對日本的好感度不斷提升。

結語：台日關係的未來展望

影片最後，牛哥總結指出，台日關係的發展歷經了複雜的歷史演變，從殖民時期的對立，到戰後的「反日」教育，再到現今的友好關係，反映了國際局勢的變遷，以及台灣社會的轉型。面對中國的威脅，台日兩國 semakin memperkuat kerja sama di berbagai bidang, 共同維護區域和平與穩定。而台灣人民對日本的「哈日」現象，也反映出台灣社會對民主、自由、法治等普世價值的認同，以及對日本文化和社會發展模式的欣賞。

Only 28,000 people are eligible. Probably only. Less than 0.001% of people qualify. But at least for those. For those who participated in the election. It’s a very different experience. It makes people feel. I am a citizen of the country. No longer feel like a human miner. People who have this experience. Different levels of identification with the country. But after Taiwan's recovery. Corruption in the Nationalist Government Worsens. Let some Taiwanese. I began to miss the Japanese rule. The social order at that time. Management Model. This old feeling. At that time, Taiwanese society gradually emerged. Take Lin Xiantang of the Lin family in Wufeng,. Taichung as an example. He used to hold. Elite of Han nationalist thought. Looking forward to Taiwan returning to China's embrace. But after experiencing Taiwan. Chaos during the early years of the Restoration. Especially various disorders. Fighting factions. Maybe it chilled him. So in the end. Escaped to Japan. Never returned to Taiwan. Or mainland China. Similar examples were not uncommon at the time. Taiwanese Native Culture During the Japanese Era. Although many are suppressed or prohibited. But the more repressed. But it has developed more. Influenced Taiwanese literature and language. The debate on. Taiwanese vernacular literature based on ethnic consciousness. Therefore, it came into being. Taiwanese literary and artistic circles. Start thinking about Taiwanese culture. And try to create. Taiwan's culture. Representative writers of the Japanese era. I believe that everyone’s previous Chinese lessons. Have you read the works of these people? Like Lai He's "One Pole Weighing the Son" The Newspaper Delivery Man by Yang Kui. Wu Zhuoliu's "Orphans of Asia" Even songs and dramas. There are also various performances. Like Deng Yuxian's "Four Seasons Red" and "Rainy Night Flowers" "Looking for Spring Breeze" and "Sadness on a Moonlit Night" Use Chinese, Taiwanese and Hakka respectively. And Japanese works. Later it was shortened to "April Rain". Puppetry has developed. With mainland China. Different performance techniques. It combines northern horn, southern horn and Luantan. Opera music such as Zhengyin, Gezai, Chaodiao, etc. The script focuses more on Minnan dialect and Chinese. In the narration or lines. Mostly in poetry, classics and history. Couplets and word guessing combination. Although during the later period of the Imperialization Movement. Limited puppet show performances. But the mountain doesn't turn, the road does. These practitioners also found. A way to cope with the situation. But some of these expressions. Affected later. The internationally renowned Golden Puppet Show. So about the development of local culture. Although there is repression or prohibition. But not because of these prohibitions. And disappeared. But after the Kuomintang came. But began to belittle the original local culture. For example, speaking Taiwanese is not allowed in school. Otherwise you'll be fined or something. This is also the impression that many elders have. Even the puppet show just now. In the era of Chiang Kai-shek. Because of puppet show. Most of them speak Taiwanese. So all puppet shows are not allowed. Let me watch Peking Opera. despite this. Taiwanese Puppet Show. Still have deep emotions. See him as a symbol of Taiwanese culture. Therefore, puppetry has a long history. Suppress inside. Still survived. And in the subsequent development. Regaining vitality. In addition, there was a period of time in Taiwan. There really was "anti-Japanese education" Postwar Republic of China government. De-Japanization. Promoting nationalist education. Emphasize Japanese aggression and exploitation. Taiwan's Level. And the anti-Japanese. movement in Taiwan during the Japanese colonial period.

Connect with China's War. of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression. Want Taiwanese to. Anti-Japanese sentiment. Educate Taiwanese to "recognize China as their motherland" The purpose was to allow Chiang Kai-shek's regime. It can show the legitimacy of "restoration" But in order to consolidate his power, Chiang Kai-shek. Conducting "anti-Japanese education" But he also wanted to oppose the Communist Party. Numerous collaborations with Japan. At the end of World War II. Japanese Officers in the China Theater. Became the. A key force. Whether it is the Kuomintang or the Communist Party. They actively tried to win over these Japanese soldiers. Use them to aid the civil war. Chiang Kai-shek believed that the Communist Party. More threatening than Japanese soldiers. So choose the following part. Cooperation with senior Japanese military officers. Especially under the Zhijiang Agreement. General Okamura Yasuji, commander. of the Japanese Expeditionary Force. With the Kuomintang's top commander. He Yingqin reached a secret agreement. Fight against the communists together. Okamura then became. Chiang Kai-shek's military adviser. Actively assist the Kuomintang. Military Actions in the Civil War. In 1949, the cooperation was further expanded. The secret of the establishment of the "White Group" Military Advisory Group. Composed of former Japanese military officers. The main purpose is to assist us in defense. and rebuilding the Kuomintang army. And conduct. Spiritual and technical education. The White Group's influence is far-reaching. Chiang Kai-shek's officers. High hopes. Even formed. People who have not been trained by the White Group. It is difficult to get promoted. The participation of the White Group in the defensive operations. Like the Battle of Guningtou. Fighting the 823rd Artillery. Played a decisive role. The influence of the White Group lasted for decades. Military education and defense system. have had a profound impact. This history has been deliberately hidden. The general public is basically ignorant of. Not even in official records. But the contribution of the White Group. Actually, it's the Kuomintang. In the process of resisting communism. A part that cannot be ignored. There are no permanent enemies between nations. Chiang Kai-shek and the former Japanese soldiers were also. In 1972, the head of the Bai Tuan. Tomita Naoaki was promoted to. General of the Republic of China Army. It's a way of repaying a favor. Loyal and Righteous. After Tomita's death. And half of his ashes. Haiming Temple in the woods. He expressed his recognition of our country. Soldiers from hostile countries. Promoted to general of his own country. This is the world's military history. It should be a good story. And when the Diaoyutai dispute. In order not to let this topic. It allows the CCP to take advantage of every opportunity. Become a destroyer of the United States, Japan and China. The breach in the tripartite relationship. The United States regards Ryukyu and Diaoyutai. When it was handed over to Japan. Chiang Kai-shek did not fight for it at that time. Let it develop naturally. Pro-communist people in Europe and America. To embarrass Chiang Kai-shek. Deliberately launched the Diaoyu Islands Protection Movement. Chiang Kai-shek still suppressed it. No conflict with Japan. But in order to appease these old forces. Or take some anti-Japanese actions. For example, banning Japanese movies from entering Taiwan. Preventing cultural exchanges between the two sides. Then I know these. Finally, let’s look at the current mainstream public opinion. Why would one be so pro-Japanese? The deep bond between Taiwan and Japan. In fact, it has a long history. This also became an important. background of the pro-Japanese complex. In the era of Chiang Kai-shek. Pro-Japanese policy was implemented. Especially through the White Group and other Japanese troops. Assisting the National Army in fighting the Communists. However, as Taiwan democratizes. and the promotion of localization. After the end of the Chiang Dynasty. The power shifted to. In the hands of local forces.

The pro-Japanese line also began. A new inheritance. But when it comes to pro-Japanese. We have to mention former President Lee Teng-hui. Brother Hui is talking to Japanese writer. Dialogue with Ryotaro Shiba. When I was born in Taiwan, I felt sad. Admit that I was Japanese before the age of 22. Japanese is my mother tongue. In 1940, due to the Imperialization Movement. So he changed his name to "Iwashiro Masao" His outlook on life and worldview. They are deeply created. The shaping of Japanese culture. He expressed it honestly. His pro-Japanese stance. Don't be afraid of criticism from others. Some political positions are more supportive of Japan. Like thinking that the sovereignty of Diaoyutai. It belongs to Japan. Proposing the "Japanese Spirit" "Taiwan-Japan Community of Shared Destiny" Japan and Taiwan. Once upon a time, we were "one country" However, this is different from the arguments. of the unificationists at that time. A sharp contrast. The unification faction. was pro-Japanese during the Chiang Kai-shek era. But with the rise of the CCP. They began to turn to hatred against Japan. And gradually pro-communist. They not only complied. The CCP’s Anti-Japanese Sentiment. 也藉此对抗辉哥跟。The DPP’s pro-Japanese stance. This has made the political spectrum more polarized. Caught between the pro-unification faction. The Kuomintang is in the middle of mainstream public opinion. It's not so easy to handle. This question. After all, the Kuomintang can be considered. The stronghold of the pro-unification camp. On the one hand, they have to face. Pressure from pro-unification forces. Advocate anti-Japanese. On the one hand, they also know. Taiwan's mainstream public opinion is pro-Japanese. So we need to go between the two. Finding the balance. This led to the Kuomintang. On this topic. Contradictory behavior. There are criticisms of Japan. There are also acts of showing goodwill to Japan. So there will be. Legislators in their own party. Jump out and attack. Political enemies are descendants of the imperial family. Traitors and traitors. But the chairman of his own party has to jump out and say. The Kuomintang stands for knowing and being friendly to Japan. We should not fall into anti-Japanese sentiment. This embarrassing thing happened. The Republic of China. Relations with Japan. Since when. Getting better? Republic of China and Japan. There were diplomatic relations before 1972. But in the following year after withdrawing from the United Nations. The diplomatic relations ended. At that time, the anti-Japanese sentiment in the country. Extremely high. However, the communication between the two sides. has never stopped. The Japanese side has an exchange association. We have the East Asia Association. These two institutions. Maintaining a substantial relationship over a long period of time. In trade and tourism. Substantial cultural exchange. Both parties are very active. Because both Taiwan and Japan. With democracy and freedom. Respect for basic human rights. Common values ​​such as the rule of law. In terms of social ethics and etiquette. A relationship that can understand each other. besides. Japanese animation. Soft power of culture such as cuisine. It also improved the Taiwanese people. Favorable impression of Japan. In the 921 earthquake. Japan dispatches emergency rescue team. And through the Red Cross. Provided a lot of donations and support. Taiwan also reciprocated. During the Great East Japan Earthquake. Taiwan's donation reached 25.3 billion yen. Mainly from the people. Small donations collected. Taiwanese people’s concern. Let the Japanese be grateful. Voices calling for "Japan-Taiwan friendship" Widely spread in Japan. The exchanges between the two sides. are becoming more and more active.

Like Taiwan to the former Prime Minister of Japan. Reactions to Shinzo Abe's death were also strong. Different groups from different places. Continuing memorial activities. Even hotter than Japan. A big reason for this is because. He once said. "If something goes wrong in Taiwan, it goes wrong in Japan" When Taiwan is short of vaccines. He told then Japanese Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga. Recommendations to support vaccines. and implement them successfully. When Japan sent vaccines to Taiwan for free. Japanese media news links below. A large number of Taiwanese people have left messages. International vaccine procurement. Difficult times. The friendship that is given free of charge. Express gratitude. Some Taiwanese also mentioned. Even if you pay the fee, it's worth it. But Japanese netizens replied to the message. When you were in the East Japan Earthquake. Already paid. This passage is very popular. in Taiwan, which is facing the epidemic. Caused quite a big response. When former President Lee passed away in 2020. Japanese media also reported extensively. In fact, the evaluation of Lee Teng-hui. Japan. Even higher than Taiwan. Taiwan's evaluation of Shinzo Abe. It surpassed Japan. Such a situation. It's actually quite reasonable. After all, foreign politicians. In different countries. The appearance shown. It will be different from the country. But both sides have mutual respect. Politicians exist. This is also a very meaningful thing. Taiwan and Japan. Relations have strengthened in recent years. Reflected behind. The World Trend of the US-Communist Cold War. Threats from the Chinese Communist Party. The instability caused by. Japan strengthens its cooperation with us. It can be said that it is in line with the current situation. As our national strength grows. Let us also become Japan. An indispensable neighbor. Like TSMC. Even if Japan invests 400 billion yen. We also hope to set up a factory in Japan. This shows the importance of our semiconductors. In terms of sightseeing. Local governments in Japan. We are looking forward to the arrival of Taiwanese tourists. There are even claims that. Our GDP per capita in 2028. May surpass Japan. From a trade perspective. Japan's trade with us. Although not as big as the CCP. But our trade is profitable. But it is a loss to the CCP. On national security. Both sides face the threat of the Chinese Communist Party. The enemy of my enemy is my friend. So Taiwan's geopolitical importance. For Japan's defense. Cannot be ignored. Japanese public opinion on Taiwan. In the past decade,. Several important turning points. First, in 2011. Disaster relief in Taiwan after the March 11 earthquake. Let Japan see "pro-Japanese Taiwan" Then came the Sunflower Movement in 2014. It highlights our political autonomy. Epidemic prevention and control in 2020. Let us become a learning object for Japan. Finally 2024. TSMC opens factory in Kumamoto. It also makes Japanese society. Caused a huge shock. Now many Japanese bookstores have. There have been many. Books about Taiwan. There are even digital political commissars. Categories with the theme of Tang Feng. This shouldn't be possible. Appear in our country. This also shows that we. Influence on Japanese people. It's just getting bigger and bigger. Okay, today's story. Let's stop here for now. If you like this episode. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks. In addition, our DC group is now open. Welcome everyone to come in and chat. My study notes.

See you next time. ByeBye.

item.title: 周杰倫最愛的淡水阿給｜我的學習筆記 #shorts #歷史 #台灣 #我的學習筆記
item.itunes:title: 周杰倫最愛的淡水阿給｜我的學習筆記 #shorts #歷史 #台灣 #我的學習筆記
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
周杰倫也愛的淡水阿給

淡水阿給，是淡水區獨一無二的小吃，由楊鄭錦文女士於1965年發明。它的靈感源自日本的油豆腐，卻是道地台灣的創意料理。這道小吃的魅力，就連天王周杰倫也難以抵擋。

阿給的製作：傳統的美味

阿給的製作過程相當講究。首先，將油豆腐小心地掏空，填入炒香的冬粉。這一步驟需要非常細心，以確保冬粉的口感與味道達到最佳狀態。接著，用魚漿封住開口，蒸熟後淋上特製的甜辣醬汁或其他口味醬汁，一道美味的阿給就完成了。

阿給的由來與特色

阿給這個名字源自日語「油炸豆皮」（あげ）的音譯簡稱。阿給有著濃郁的口味，外皮微脆，內餡Q彈，搭配醬汁更是一絕。

老牌阿給：傳承的美味

創始店「老牌阿給」位於淡水區真理街，如今由第二代傳人楊惠珠接手經營。楊姐堅持保留傳統的做法和味道，讓這道小吃在數十年間始終深受喜愛，成為到訪淡水的必吃美食。

淡水的象徵，台灣的美味

阿給不僅是淡水的象徵之一，也是許多遊客來台灣必吃的美食。其魅力可見一斑。店家甚至推出了「周董套餐」，可見天王周杰倫對它的喜愛。
================================================

周杰倫最愛的淡水阿給。話說我們的阿給。是淡水區的獨特小吃。是由楊鄭錦文女士。

在1965年所創的。靈感是來自於日本的油豆腐。但卻是一道完全。屬於臺灣的創意料理。

阿給的製作過程十分講究。

首先要先把油豆腐掏空。

然後填入炒過的冬粉。這一步需要細心處理。確保冬粉的口感跟味道。要達到最佳。

接下來用魚漿把開口封好。

蒸熟後再淋上。特製的甜辣醬或是其他醬汁。

阿給這個名稱來源於日語。「油炸豆皮」（あげ）。的音譯簡稱。

阿給的口味濃郁。外表微脆、內餡Q彈。配上醬汁以後更是滋味無窮。

創始店「老牌阿給」。位於淡水區的真理街。如今是由第二代傳人。楊惠珠接手經營。

楊姐堅持保留傳統的手法跟味道。讓這小吃在幾十年間。始終深受喜歡。成為到訪淡水的必吃名單。

阿給不只是淡水的象徵之一。也是遊客們心目中。來台灣必吃的美食。連周杰倫也愛吃。

店裡還有周董套餐。

不過先說我沒業配就是了。

====

周杰倫最愛的淡水阿給｜我的學習筆記 #shorts #歷史 #台灣 #我的學習筆記

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCAS8QqEyGGH71xYgFzNSbuw

我的學習筆記[YT+]

================================================

周杰倫最愛的淡水阿給。話說我們的阿給。是淡水區的獨特小吃。是由楊鄭錦文女士。

在1965年所創的。靈感是來自於日本的油豆腐。但卻是一道完全。屬於臺灣的創意料理。

阿給的製作過程十分講究。

首先要先把油豆腐掏空。

然後填入炒過的冬粉。這一步需要細心處理。確保冬粉的口感跟味道。要達到最佳。

接下來用魚漿把開口封好。

蒸熟後再淋上。特製的甜辣醬或是其他醬汁。

阿給這個名稱來源於日語。「油炸豆皮」（あげ）。的音譯簡稱。

阿給的口味濃郁。外表微脆、內餡Q彈。配上醬汁以後更是滋味無窮。

創始店「老牌阿給」。位於淡水區的真理街。如今是由第二代傳人。楊惠珠接手經營。

楊姐堅持保留傳統的手法跟味道。讓這小吃在幾十年間。始終深受喜歡。成為到訪淡水的必吃名單。

阿給不只是淡水的象徵之一。也是遊客們心目中。來台灣必吃的美食。連周杰倫也愛吃。

店裡還有周董套餐。

不過先說我沒業配就是了。
